name: Fajita Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. I have used diet cola with no problem.
2. Combine the cola and soy sauce in a bowl until well mixed.
3. Sprinkle the meat generously with garlic salt to taste and at least 1 tablespoon of lemon pepper per pound of meat.
4. Allow the meat to marinate for 6-8 hours, turning occasionally if desired.
Makes 1 cup.
